trans-unit.source: Call an MCP tool on a running resource
trans-unit.target: 실행 중인 리소스에서 MCP 도구 호출

trans-unit.source: JSON input to pass to the tool
The name of the resource that exposes the MCP tool
The name of the MCP tool to call
Warning: 'aspire mcp' commands are deprecated and will be removed in a future release. Please use 'aspire agent' instead.
trans-unit.target: 경고: 'aspire mcp' 명령은 더 이상 사용되지 않으며 향후 릴리스에서 제거될 예정입니다. 대신 'aspire agent'를 사용하세요.

trans-unit.source: Interact with MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools exposed by Aspire resources
trans-unit.target: Aspire 리소스에서 제공하는 MCP(모델 컨텍스트 프로토콜) 도구와 상호 작용하세요

trans-unit.source: Which additional options do you want to enable?
Which agent environments do you want to configure?
Agent environment configuration complete.
Install Playwright CLI for browser automation?
trans-unit.target: 브라우저 자동화를 위해 Playwright CLI를 설치하시겠나요?

trans-unit.source: Create agent environment specific instruction files?
Initialize MCP server configuration for detected agent environments (deprecated, use 'agent init')
trans-unit.target: 검색된 에이전트 환경에 대한 MCP 서버 구성 초기화(사용되지 않음, 'agent init' 사용)

trans-unit.source: Detecting agent environments...
No agent environments were detected.
Directory not found: {0}
Enter the path to the root of your workspace:
Workspace root path is required.
Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server (deprecated, use 'agent mcp')
trans-unit.target: MCP(모델 컨텍스트 프로토콜) 서버를 시작합니다 (더 이상 사용되지 않음, 'agent mcp' 사용)

trans-unit.source: List MCP tools exposed by running resources
trans-unit.target: 리소스를 실행하여 노출되는 MCP 도구 나열

trans-unit.source: Output format (Table or Json)
